passed.description: Total number of tests that passed

failed.description: Total number of tests that failed

errors.description: Total number of tests that had errors

name.description: The name of the test function

file.description: The test file containing this test

outcome.description: The test outcome (passed, failed, skipped, error)

duration.description: Time in seconds taken to run the test
